ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Develops new crop varieties with desirable traits through genetic research and breeding.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Conducts experiments to understand the genetic basis of crop traits, identifies and isolates desirable genes, and develops new crop varieties with improved yield, disease resistance, and nutritional content.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in pursuing a career in plant breeding and genetics.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree in a related field, looking to transition into plant breeding and genetics.
certifications_or_bridge_needed: Certification in Plant Breeding and Genetics

future_builder.description: Experienced plant breeders and geneticists looking to advance their careers.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2+ years of experience in plant breeding and genetics

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields looking to switch to plant breeding and genetics.
survival_skills_needed: Programming skills in R or Python
portfolio_proof_required: Project on crop improvement using genetic markers

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Develop a new crop variety using genetic markers
Deploy and evaluate the new variety
